documents.title: Payment Release 2026-04-10
documents.content: The payment-api release on 2026-04-10 touched retry middleware and idempotency handling. Rollback guidance: if payment 5xx rises immediately after release, confirm rollback and compare retry middleware changes.

documents.title: Incident Task Sync Checklist
documents.content: Before syncing incident follow-up tasks, confirm owner, rationale, and source citations. External task creation must stay behind explicit confirmation.
